items.name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry's new arrival, exquisite quilted style. The Lauren bag is crafted from Italian tanned lamb leather, featuring the exclusive Burberry Thoms monogram, paired with a glossy chain shoulder strap. Can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody. 27.5*11*12cm, chain and lamb leather shoulder strap. 1 interior slip pocket, zip closure, hand-painted edges, glossy metal hardware. 1124

items.name_cn:
'Burberry'
Brand new structured bag with a TB exclusive logo lock. Made from selected Italian leather. Features a Thomas Bur exclusive logo lock, creating a shoulder or crossbody look.
Size: 20 x 5.5 x 12.5cm
Model: 80522321
Outer: 100% Calfskin
Trim: 100% Calfskin
Lining: 100% Viscose
Adjustable chain shoulder strap
2 interior card slots
Top flap with lock closure
Hand-painted edges
Glossy metal hardware
Made in Italy

items.name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry's classic underarm tote bag, 😀 is now a popular vintage shop favorite. Many influencers are hunting for it, willing to pay thousands for a pre-owned piece. Adjustable strap, can be carried by hand or underarm, and with an extra chain, it becomes a crossbody bag. A truly versatile classic!
Size: 21/5/14cm

items.name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry most classic vintage baguette underarm bag, stylish whether worn on the shoulder or carried by hand. Very light body, with a zip pocket inside for easy storage. 😆 Spacious, a classic must-have. Stylish and versatile, suitable for casual or professional looks. Elegant and charming, exuding a premium feel!
Size: 26-7-16! 2152

items.name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
Burberry vintage series new small messenger bag! Imported vintage brown cowhide, 1.4cm thick. Imported Limonta vintage series new arrival! Top-grain leather paired with classic check pattern; the vintage brown adds an artistic touch! The check pattern is eco-friendly, easy to clean, and the bag size is suitable for daily needs. Can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody! A must-have item!
Size: 21/8.5/18cm!

items.name_cn:
'Burberry'
Small crossbody bag 'Title-Tyler Bag', made of leather and canvas with decorative topstitching. Features the Fashion Show Horseferry print, a refined top metal bar design, and three rivet closures.
Size: W19×H15×D5cm
Model: 2731, Small
Shortest vertical strap length: 47cm
Longest vertical strap length: 53cm
Adjustable crossbody strap
2 interior compartments
Top flap with magnetic snap closure
Hand-painted edges
Glossy metal hardware
Made in Italy
